projectDescription: An agentic AI coding assistant that runs in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster through natural language commands.
keyFeatures: Natural language coding assistant running directly in the terminal
Reads, edits, and writes files across your entire codebase
Executes bash commands and manages git workflows
MCP (Model Context Protocol) server integration for extensibility
Multi-agent and parallel task execution (swarm mode)
Session management with persistent conversation history
IDE integration (VS Code, JetBrains, and others)
Programmable SDK for embedding Claude Code in applications
Hooks system for custom pre/post tool execution logic
Skills and plugins for extending capabilities
publicApiSurface: query({ prompt, options }) — run a single agentic query
unstable_v2_createSession(options) — create a persistent multi-turn session
unstable_v2_resumeSession(sessionId, options) — resume an existing session
getSessionInfo(sessionId, options) — read metadata for a single session
renameSession(sessionId, title, options) — rename a session
tagSession(sessionId, tag, options) — tag a session
forkSession(sessionId, options) — fork a session into a new branch
tool(name, description, schema, handler) — define a custom MCP tool
createSdkMcpServer(options) — create an in-process MCP server
